Emergency response providers put their lives at risk to save others.
A night at an amusement park takes a deadly turn when a roller coaster malfunction leaves lives hanging in the balance; Abby reaches out to Buck; Athena and Hen respond to an unusual home invasion.

The crew races to an emergency at an Indian wedding; Abby enlists Buck to help her find her mother; Abby meets Athena for the first time; Bobby confronts his past; Hen struggles to make the right decision.

On Valentine's Day, a surprise marriage proposal goes awry with dangerous consequences; Athena attempts to help a desperate woman; Bobby and Chimney pull holiday duty; Abby and Buck go on their first official date.

The first responders race to rescue victims trapped in various tight spots; Athena contemplates accepting a promotion that will take her out of the field; Chimney finally deals with the aftermath of his near fatal car crash.

Maddie goes on a ride-along with Athena; Hen must figure out how to save her family from permanently falling apart; the first responders deal with emergencies both at a military funeral and a movie theater.

The first responders unwittingly become the subject of an eager reporter's first on-air assignment; Athena prepares for May's homecoming dance; the team responds to emergencies at an eating contest, a bodybuilding competition and a toddler pageant.

Halloween finds the first responders racing to the rescue at a cemetery, a haunted hayride and a spooky parade; Maddie thinks she has received a "ghost" call from a missing hiker; Hen is in a life-or-death situation with her father.

Buck jumps back into the dating scene but fears he will return to his old ways; a woman goes to great extremes on a freeway overpass to get the attention of her husband; a couple have a car accident on their wedding day.
Hen relives her evolution into the firefighter she is today as she recalls the first times she met Chimney and Athena.

During the holidays, the first responders must deal with a stampede at a toy store, a mistletoe stunt gone awry and neighbors competing in a Christmas light showdown; Bobby contemplates his future with Athena; Chimney and Buck try to help Maddie.

The call center is hit with a system-wide power outage and must go old school to respond to emergencies; the first responders must deal with explosions in multiple homes and a difficult childbirth; Michael confronts Bobby about parenting his kids.
When a going-away party for a bank manager turns into an emergency, the first responders are accused of pulling off a daring heist.

programme.title: What On Earth - EP 6

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 25
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 31
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. Conflict arises when they both fall in love with the same man, creating an emotional romantic drama that tugs at the heartstrings.

programme.title: THEATER DRAMA : MASIH SAYANG TAPI BIMBANG
programme.desc: A program drama FTV about love, friendship, family, happy, sad etc, played by popular actor and actress Indonesia.

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 14
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 91
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: KARENA AKU SAYANG 36
programme.desc: Kenzie is a man who has experienced countless traumatic events in his past. These experiences have shaped him into a perfectionist who often makes things difficult for those around him. One of them is Zara, his personal assistant, who constantly tries to cheer him up as he frequently experiences mood swings in various situations.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger

programme.title: Tanya Ustazah Ep02

programme.title: Trek Asatizah Ep12
programme.desc: Muhammad Hafiz Bin Mohd Haneefa, mendapat ijazah sarjana daripada UIAM (Quran Sunnah), dan bekerja sebagai Pensyarah qiraati dan Naib presiden Akademik di Kolej Hafiz, Klang. Menyertai Pencetus Ummah musim pertama 2013, mengenali lebih dekat siapakah Pu Hafiz dan bagaimana detik permulaan beliau menyertai pencetus ummah?

programme.title: Islam & Seni Ep03
programme.desc: penulisan Khat/kaligrafi aksara Arab yang berkembang maju dan mempunyai sejarahnya yang tersendiri bersama Pensyarah UITM, Prof. Madya Dr Nor Azlin Hamidon & Pereka Khat/Kaligrafi Ustaz Fadil Sulaiman.

programme.title: Diau Charn
programme.desc: Set in the Han Dynasty, this drama depicts the legendary beauty Diao Chan, and how she used her charms to help her godfather eradicate corrupt court officials.

programme.title: Mad Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: After a kung-fu master (Lau Kar Leung) is crippled by a ruthless villain, he teaches a boy monkey kung-fu to avenge his shame.

programme.title: My Name Ain't Suzie
programme.desc: A poor young woman becomes a popular bargirl in Hong Kong's gritty response to Hollywood's The World of Suzie Wong.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: A man (Alexander Fu Sheng) must learn several unique martial arts styles and compete in three trials before he can marry his beloved.

programme.title: The Human Goddess
programme.desc: An alluring female fairy seeks love among mortals and finds it in a man who takes care of an orphanage.

programme.title: The Magnificent Swordsman
programme.desc: A village boy recruits his friends to help peasants rid their village of marauding bandits, the leader being the man who killed his family.

programme.title: Guess Who Killed My Twelve Lovers?
programme.desc: A beauty is accused of slaying her boyfriends. After fleeing to Lantau Island, she seduces another man there.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Starring John Chiang, Ti Lung, Yueh Wah, Ku Feng and Chen Kuan Tai, this classic depicts how the brothers of the classic Water Margin fight local authorities.

programme.title: West Chamber
programme.desc: Based on a famed Chinese opera, this melodramatic film depicts the romance between Zhang Sheng, an impoverished scholar, and Ying Ying, who is from a wealthy family.

programme.title: Brave Archer and His Mate
programme.desc: Fourth in the hugely popular series, the leader of 'Venom', supported by his fellow members and Brave Archer associates, sets out to defeat a mass murderer.

programme.title: The Cave of Silken Web
programme.desc: Seven seductive Spiders lie in wait for our faithful heroes in the third installment of the Shaw Brothers adaptation of Journey to the West.

programme.title: Portrait in Crystal
programme.desc: Action - Tragic deaths in the underworld cause leader 'Yama' to suspect a portrait in crystal with mysterious powers. He sends Hen Pan and Pai Pan to interrogate its creator, martial artist Lung Fei.

programme.title: Godfather of Canton
programme.desc: When Commissioner Liu Ta-hua is arrested by special envoy Cheng for corruption, see how Lin, a coolie is unwittingly fated to play a role in his release.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: This epic depicts the romance between the Jade Emperor's seventh daughter and a young village man. When Heaven and Earth meet, can a common ground be found?

programme.title: Disco Bumpkins
programme.desc: This musical production features George Lam in a humorous tale of a man who seeks love and success in a world of TV commercials, along with his two friends.

programme.title: Finger of Doom
programme.desc: A sword-master turned umbrella-maker goes up against a zombie-maker with a 'finger of doom' in this critically acclaimed film.

programme.title: Inside the Forbidden City
programme.desc: This film marks the Shaw Brothers' quintessential 'Huangmei Opera' costume drama, with a superb performance from Ivy Ling Po and Chin Feng.

programme.title: The Flying Dagger
programme.desc: The Flying Dagger is an exceptional collaboration between Chang Cheh and swordswoman supreme, Cheng Pei-pei of 'Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon.'

programme.title: The Mermaid
programme.desc: Fans of 'The Little Mermaid' are in for a delightful surprise when they see this spectacular Chinese operatic adaptation, where a carp turns into a fairy.

programme.title: Swordswomen Three
programme.desc: In this classic, Shen Yi, Essie Lin Chia, and Pan Ying-tzu take on Shaw's first international superstar, Lo Lieh, making this a 4-star treat for action fans.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Playfulness abounds and innocence is lost in this tale of two naughty females who grow up and discover boys together.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: The story of the Shaolin Temple's betrayal by the White-Browed Hermit and Shaolin hothead Fong Sai-yuk's revenge bid gets retold again.

programme.title: Love Without End
programme.desc: This classic romance stars Linda Lin and Kwan Shan| capturing a touching love story between a famous nightclub singer and a young architect.

programme.title: Five Elements Ninjas
programme.desc: When evil ninjas brutally slaughter students from a noble Chinese kung-fu academy, the one survivor forms a powerful group to avenge his fallen comrades.

programme.title: The Enchanting Ghost
programme.desc: A cruel uncle stands in the way between a young scholar and the beautiful gal with whom he falls in love, and happiness.

programme.title: Killer Constable
programme.desc: In director Kuei Chih Hung and kung-fu champion Chen Kuan Tai's best martial arts movie, Chen illuminates the screen as an obsessive chief constable.

programme.title: Beyond the Great Wall
programme.desc: Linda Lin Dai plays a beauty tricked into sacrificing herself for the good of the Chinese people. However, the truth is revealed too late.

programme.title: KARNAVAL SCTV 2022
programme.desc: Karnaval SCTV is a flagship variety show produced routinely by SCTV. Traveling to a different region across Indonesia each month, the grand roadshow brings together SCTV's elite stars—ranging from top soap opera actors and magicians to renowned singers—masterfully blending mainstream entertainment with the unique cultural heritage of each local city it visits.

programme.title: GASPOL
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: Cinta Abang Tamvan Pantang Disayurin
programme.desc: Nando (Morgan Oey) helps Sesil (Rayna Snova), who is about to be sold abroad. Nando asks his mother for permission to let Sesil stay at her house.

programme.title: Perawat Cinta Cantiknya Gak Ada Obat
programme.desc: Dimas (Kenny Austin) has just been in a single-car accident that resulted in a broken leg. An ambulance arrives to help him, along with a nurse named Luna (Larasati Nugroho). At the hospital, Dimas's mother wants Luna to care for him until he recovers.

programme.title: HOT SHOT
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Keliatan Banget Nyenggol Hati King Dosen
programme.desc: As Galang passed by, a man wearing the same jacket ran past him. Moments later, the man came chasing after Erin's purse snatcher. Galang was nearly beaten by the mob. Galang was accused of stealing Erin's wallet. Ultimately, Galang was saved and acquitted. Erin searched for the house address and managed to find Lalu, who introduced himself as Johan's son. It turned out that Erin had been searching

programme.title: Rekayasa Cinta Dokter Cantik No Play Play
programme.desc: Angel (Zoe Abbas), who is constantly pressured by her mother to marry, finally takes the practical route by claiming to be the lover of her patient who suffers from amnesia. Angel's two friends disagree with Angel's idea, but ultimately they support her. Angel says she will soon marry a man whose real name is Marcel (Bryan McKenzie) because Angel claims to be Marcel's fiancée before Marcel's amnes
